splashDescription: The menu uses the illustrated splash background. Three.js stays idle until you pick a play mode.
settingsDescription: Tuning panel for audio, visual, accessibility and controls. This screen stays 2D and free from three.js.
soundMixDescription: Music, crowd, impacts, and UI feedback levels.
visualSetupDescription: Brightness, camera shake, contrast, and screen safe area.
inputMapDescription: Keyboard, pad, touch, and future remapping profiles.
assistOptionsDescription: Readable HUD, reduced motion, timing assists, and captions.
changesPlaceholder: Changes shown here are UI placeholders until the gameplay systems are wired.
creditsDescription: A 2D information screen for attribution, tools, and release notes.
independentSoloBuildDescription: Built and maintained as an indie project with heavy LLM assistance and prompt-aligned visual direction.
stackDescription: The menu remains 2D. Three.js is reserved for play scenes and future gameplay modules.
urbanArcadeBaseDescription: A browser-game interface shaped around street culture, bold contrast, and readable controller-first surfaces.
creditsFooter: Credits content will grow together with the project contributors and release notes.
playSceneDescription: The 3D arena is live. Keep the overlay light and use fullscreen for the best stage feel.
